ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellite_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite that captured the image */,
  "product" TEXT /* Identifier for the product type (e.g., MCD15A3H) */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band of the satellite image (e.g., Lai_500m) */,
  "modis_date" TEXT /* MODIS acquisition date */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time when the image was captured */,
  "value_min" REAL /* Minimum pixel value in the image */,
  "value_max" REAL /* Maximum pixel value in the image */,
  "value_sum" REAL /* Sum of pixel values in the image */,
  "value_range" REAL /* Range of pixel values */,
  "value_mean" REAL /* Mean pixel value in the image */,
  "value_variance" REAL /* Variance of pixel values in the image */,
  "value_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of pixel values */,
  "pixels_total" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels in the image */,
  "pixels_pass_qa" INTEGER /* Number of pixels that passed quality assurance */,
  "pixels_pass_qa_per_cent" REAL /* Percentage of pixels that passed quality assurance */,
  "proc_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was processed */,
  "value_center" REAL /* Center value of pixel data */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover in the image */,
  "sun_elevation" REAL /* Sun elevation angle at the time of image capture */,
  "sun_azimuth" REAL /* Sun azimuth angle at the time of image capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_band FOREIGN KEY ("band") REFERENCES bands ("band_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_modis_date FOREIGN KEY ("modis_date") REFERENCES dates ("modis_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_product FOREIGN KEY ("product") REFERENCES products ("product_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite product (e.g., MCD15A3H) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., land cover, vegetation indices) */,
  "processing_level" TEXT /* Processing level of the product (e.g., Level 1, Level 2, Level 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band (e.g., Lai_500m) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the band */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the band in micrometers */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the band in micrometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date entry */,
  "modis_date" TEXT /* MODIS acquisition date */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "proc_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was processed */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the image was captured (e.g., spring, summer, autumn, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pixels" (
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pixel entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "pixels_total" INTEGER /* Total number of pixels in the image */,
  "pixels_pass_qa" INTEGER /* Number of pixels that passed quality assurance */,
  "pixels_pass_qa_per_cent" REAL /* Percentage of pixels that passed quality assurance */,
  "pixel_size" REAL /* Size of each pixel in meters */,
  "pixel_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of each pixel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pixel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "qa_flag" TEXT /* Quality assurance flag (e.g., good, moderate, poor) */,
  "qa_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality assurance flag */,
  "qa_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the image (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "qa_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the quality assurance process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "value_min" REAL /* Minimum pixel value */,
  "value_max" REAL /* Maximum pixel value */,
  "value_sum" REAL /* Sum of pixel values */,
  "value_range" REAL /* Range of pixel values */,
  "value_mean" REAL /* Mean pixel value */,
  "value_variance" REAL /* Variance of pixel values */,
  "value_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of pixel values */,
  "value_center" REAL /* Center value of pixel data */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., mean, median, standard deviation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the image (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the image was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES satellite_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processed image */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Description of processing steps taken */,
  "processor" TEXT /* Name of the processor or processing tool */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when processing occurred */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing the image */,
  "processing_version" TEXT /* Version of the processing software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES satellite_images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_activity" TEXT /* Summary of the activities performed during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Vegetation, Urban) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category (e.g., 'VEG' for vegetation) */,
  "category_source" TEXT /* Source of the category information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_categories_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES satellite_images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  "orbital_parameters" TEXT /* Orbital parameters of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., camera, spectrometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., 'sun_elevation') */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES satellite_images ("image_id")
)
